name: Bounded Worker Supervisor
objective: Execute Codex CLI workers as bounded, cancellable, observable processes while preserving deterministic scheduler, approval, scope, budget, and evidence authority.
scope: versioned worker task, report, result, and budget contracts
generic worker supervisor with a Codex CLI adapter
sanitized process environments and declared write-scope enforcement
independent process groups, cancellation, inactivity, wall-clock, output, token, command, and retry budgets
strict report validation against exact observed Git and ignored-file changes
content-addressed evidence references and failed-worktree quarantine
fenced PostgreSQL attempt creation, start, finish, replay, and restart reconciliation
one-shot operational CLI, structured lifecycle events, fault injection, and reproducible Linux builds
out_of_scope: worktree creation, leased delivery, and automated quarantine disposal owned by Sprint 05
remote container execution and production host confidentiality boundaries
semantic retrieval, graph projection, and context brokering
author: codex
independent_validator: Protected GitHub Actions and isolated Codex CLI review of the exact public candidate
